title: Simplest Emerald Gear
body:
# About

**Do you think it's unfair that emeralds can't be used to make armor and tools? I do!**

This mod adds a full emerald gear with characteristics between iron and diamond, correcting this injustice.

# FAQ

**Q:** Will you port Simplest Emerald Gear to Fabric?\
**A:** No, we usually only use Neoforge

**Q:** Will you back-port Simplest Emerald Gear to X version?\
**A:** No, we don't usually back-port
